title: Beef and Brochette French Flaky Pastry
description: A French-inspired pastry dish filled with tender beef and brochette, wrapped in a flaky crust.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a pan over medium heat, cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the brochette to the pan and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season the beef mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Spread the beef mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Dot the top of the beef mixture with butter.
Fold the pastry over the beef mixture, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a knife or pastry brush to create a decorative edge.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
